title: 7 Days Bali Romantic Getaway
description: Experience Bali like never before. Stays in premium oceanfront private villa, couples massage, private catamaran cruise, and tours around iconic temples.

itinerary.title: Arrival & Welcome Dinner
itinerary.description: Arrive at Ngurah Rai International Airport. Transfer to your oceanfront resort in Seminyak. Enjoy a romantic candlelit dinner at the beach.

itinerary.title: Uluwatu Temple & Kecak Dance
itinerary.description: Visit the magnificent Uluwatu temple perched on a cliff edge. Watch the traditional Kecak Fire Dance performance against the sunset.

itinerary.title: Ubud Rice Paddies & Swing Tour
itinerary.description: Travel to Ubud. Walk through the Tegallalang Rice Terraces, take pictures on the famous Bali Swing, and explore the Monkey Forest.

itinerary.title: Volcano Hiking & Hot Springs
itinerary.description: Early morning hike up Mount Batur to witness the majestic sunrise. Relax in Toya Devasya natural hot springs.

itinerary.title: Nusa Penida Day Trip
itinerary.description: Speedboat to Nusa Penida island. Visit Kelingking Beach, Angel's Billabong, and snorkel at Crystal Bay.

itinerary.title: Couples Spa & Sunset Cruise
itinerary.description: Morning Ayurvedic couples massage. Afternoon luxury catamaran sunset dinner cruise.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Free morning for shopping. Transfer to airport for your flight home.

title: Luxury Paris Honeymoon & City Tour
description: Spend 5 glorious days in Paris. Includes Eiffel Tower skip-the-line, private Seine River dinner cruise, Louvre private guide, and Versailles palace day trip.

itinerary.title: Arrival & Hotel Check-in
itinerary.description: Arrive in Paris. Transfer to boutique hotel near Champs-Élysées. Explore city of lights at your own pace.

itinerary.title: Eiffel Tower & Seine Cruise
itinerary.description: Skip-the-line Eiffel Tower summit. Evening 3-course dinner cruise on the Seine River.

itinerary.title: Louvre & Notre Dame Walk
itinerary.description: Private guided Louvre tour. Walk through Latin Quarter and view Notre-Dame Cathedral.

itinerary.title: Versailles Palace Trip
itinerary.description: Train to magnificent Palace of Versailles. Explore Hall of Mirrors and royal gardens.

itinerary.title: Montmartre & Departure
itinerary.description: Explore artistic Montmartre, visit Sacré-Cœur, pick up souvenirs before airport transfer.

title: Thrill Seekers Manali Adventure
description: Action-packed adventure in the snow-capped mountains. Includes trekking, river rafting, paragliding, and camping under the stars.

itinerary.title: Camp Check-in & Acclimatization
itinerary.description: Arrive in Manali. Transfer to riverside campsite in Solang Valley. Bonfire and live music.

itinerary.title: Paragliding & Zorbing Solang Valley
itinerary.description: High-altitude paragliding, ATV rides, and adventure activities.

itinerary.title: White Water Rafting & Jogini Waterfalls
itinerary.description: Beas River rafting, Jogini Waterfalls hike, Vashisht Hot Springs.

itinerary.title: Hadimba Temple & Departure
itinerary.description: Explore historic Hadimba Temple, Mall Road shopping, then departure.

title: Kerala Backwaters & Houseboat Experience
description: Immerse yourself in nature's greenery. Cruise serene backwaters on a private houseboat and relax with professional Ayurvedic spa therapies.

itinerary.title: Kochi Arrival & Transfer to Munnar
itinerary.description: Arrive in Kochi, drive to Munnar through lush tea gardens and waterfalls.

itinerary.title: Munnar Tea Gardens Tour
itinerary.description: Explore Eravikulam National Park, Mattupetty Dam, and tea estates.

itinerary.title: Thekkady Wildlife Reserve
itinerary.description: Boat safari on Periyar Lake to spot elephants, deer, and exotic birds.

itinerary.title: Houseboat Boarding Alleppey
itinerary.description: Board traditional houseboat. Glide along calm canals and watch the sunset.

itinerary.title: Ayurvedic Spa & Kochi Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Authentic Ayurvedic massage. Fort Kochi sightseeing and Chinese Fishing Nets.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Free morning for shopping. Transfer to Kochi airport.

title: Goa Beach Party & Heritage Tour
description: Relax on sandy beaches, enjoy thrilling water sports, explore Portuguese-era heritage churches, and experience Goa's famous nightlife.

itinerary.title: Goa Arrival & Calangute Beach Sunset
itinerary.description: Arrive in Goa. Check in to beach resort. Relax at Calangute beach and enjoy beach shack nightlife.

itinerary.title: Scuba Diving & North Goa Water Sports
itinerary.description: Boat trip for dolphin sighting and scuba diving. Jet ski, parasailing, and banana boat rides at Baga Beach.

itinerary.title: Old Goa Churches & Spice Plantation
itinerary.description: Visit Basilica of Bom Jesus. Traditional lunch at a tropical Spice Plantation. Airport transfer.

title: Delhi Historical Heritage Tour
description: Explore the spectacular historical monuments of Old and New Delhi. Includes guided visits to Qutub Minar, Red Fort, India Gate, and Humayun's Tomb.

itinerary.title: Arrival & Old Delhi Heritage
itinerary.description: Arrive in Delhi. Check-in at hotel. Visit the grand Red Fort, Jama Masjid, and take a heritage rickshaw ride in Chandni Chowk.

itinerary.title: New Delhi & Historical Monuments
itinerary.description: Visit the towering Qutub Minar, the beautiful Humayun's Tomb, India Gate, and drive past Rashtrapati Bhavan.

itinerary.title: Lotus Temple & Departure
itinerary.description: Explore the architectural marvel of Lotus Temple and Akshardham Temple before transfer to airport/station.

title: Triund Peak Camping & Trekking
description: Trek to the pristine ridge of Triund near McLeod Ganj. Enjoy panoramic views of the majestic Dhauladhar ranges, camp under a star-filled sky, and sit around a warm bonfire.

itinerary.title: Trek from Dharamkot to Triund Peak
itinerary.description: Assemble at McLeod Ganj. Start your 9km trek to Triund, passing through rhododendron and oak forests. Check-in to campsite on the ridge, followed by bonfire and dinner.

itinerary.title: Sunrise Views & Descent
itinerary.description: Witness a breathtaking sunrise over the snow-clad Dhauladhar mountains. Have breakfast and trek back to McLeod Ganj for departure.

title: Hampta Pass Crossover Adventure
description: Experience one of the most stunning crossover treks in Himachal. Crossover from the lush green valleys of Manali to the stark, lunar-like landscapes of Spiti Valley via Hampta Pass.

itinerary.title: Drive to Jobra & Trek to Chika
itinerary.description: Drive from Manali to Jobra. Start a gentle 2-hour trek along the Rani Nallah stream to the beautiful campsite of Chika.

itinerary.title: Trek from Chika to Balu ka Gera
itinerary.description: Trek through alpine wildflower meadows, crossing boulder sections and streams to reach the Balu ka Gera campsite at 11,900 ft.

itinerary.title: Pass Crossover to Shea Goru via Hampta Pass
itinerary.description: Steep climb to the summit of Hampta Pass (14,100 ft). Soak in views of the majestic peaks and slide down snowy slopes to reach Shea Goru.

itinerary.title: Trek to Chatru & Drive to Chandra Taal
itinerary.description: Descend through the barren mountains of Lahaul to Chatru. Drive to the crescent-shaped sacred Chandra Taal lake (Moon Lake) and camp.

itinerary.title: Drive from Chatru to Manali
itinerary.description: Drive back to Manali via the famous Atal Tunnel. Disband at Manali in the afternoon.

title: Chopta Chandrashila & Tungnath Trek
description: Trek to the highest Shiva temple in the world at Tungnath, and ascend to the majestic Chandrashila Peak. Witness a 360-degree panoramic view of the massive Garhwal Himalayas.
inclusions: Trek Guide, Support Staff & Entry Fees

itinerary.title: Rishikesh to Chopta Scenic Drive
itinerary.description: Drive along the sacred Ganga and Alaknanda rivers, passing Devprayag. Arrive at the scenic meadows of Chopta (Mini Switzerland of Uttarakhand).

itinerary.title: Summit Day: Tungnath & Chandrashila
itinerary.description: Trek 4km to the historic Tungnath Temple. Ascend another steep 1.5km to Chandrashila Peak (12,100 ft) for a 360-degree view of Chaukhamba and Nanda Devi peaks. Return to Chopta.

itinerary.title: Sari Village, Deoriatal Hike & Return
itinerary.description: Trek 2.3km to the beautiful Deoriatal lake, reflecting the Chaukhamba peaks. Drive back to Rishikesh.

title: Bavarian Castles & Munich Tour
description: Explore the rich culture of Bavaria! Tour Munich's historic Marienplatz, and take day trips to the fairytale Neuschwanstein Castle and the pristine Alps.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Munich & Old Town Walk
itinerary.description: Arrive in Munich, check-in to hotel. Enjoy a guided walking tour of Marienplatz, the Glockenspiel, and the English Garden.

itinerary.title: Fairytale Neuschwanstein Castle Tour
itinerary.description: Take a scenic coach journey through the Bavarian countryside to visit King Ludwig II's stunning Neuschwanstein Castle.

itinerary.title: Bavarian Alps & Lake Starnberg
itinerary.description: Train trip to the edge of the Alps. Cruise beautiful Lake Starnberg and explore local alpine villages.

itinerary.title: Museums & Departure
itinerary.description: Visit the Deutsches Museum or BMW Welt before departure.

title: Canadian Rockies & Vancouver Scenic Tour
description: Discover the gorgeous Pacific Northwest and the majestic Canadian Rockies. Travel from coastal Vancouver to the glacier lakes of Banff National Park.
inclusions: Banff & Lake Louise National Park Tours

itinerary.title: Arrival in Vancouver & City Highlights
itinerary.description: Arrive in Vancouver. Explore Stanley Park, Gastown historic steam clock, and Granville Island Public Market.

itinerary.title: Capilano Suspension Bridge & Whistler Drive
itinerary.description: Walk across the thrilling Capilano Suspension Bridge. Drive the Sea-to-Sky Highway to Whistler alpine resort.

itinerary.title: Rocky Mountaineer Train: Vancouver to Kamloops
itinerary.description: Board the luxury Rocky Mountaineer train. Experience spectacular vistas of the Fraser River Canyon and river rapids.

itinerary.title: Rocky Mountaineer Train: Kamloops to Banff
itinerary.description: Continue train journey into the Canadian Rockies. Arrive in the beautiful mountain town of Banff.

itinerary.title: Lake Louise & Columbia Icefield Glacier Tour
itinerary.description: Visit the turquoise waters of Lake Louise. Take an ice-explorer tour onto the massive Athabasca Glacier.

itinerary.title: Banff Gondola & Calgary Departure
itinerary.description: Ride the Banff Gondola for a 360-degree view. Transfer to Calgary airport for departure.

title: Sydney Harbour & Coastal Wonders Tour
description: Experience the absolute best of Australia's iconic city. Tour the Sydney Opera House, take a private harbor yacht cruise, and walk along Bondi beach.
inclusions: Sydney Opera House Private Behind-the-scenes Tour

itinerary.title: Arrival in Sydney & Harbour Walk
itinerary.description: Arrive in Sydney. Transfer to your luxury hotel. Take a walking tour of Circular Quay, Sydney Harbour Bridge, and historical Rocks district.

itinerary.title: Sydney Opera House & Sunset Yacht Cruise
itinerary.description: Private tour of the legendary Sydney Opera House. Relax on a sunset catamaran dinner cruise around the harbor.

itinerary.title: Bondi Beach & Spectacular Coastal Walk
itinerary.description: Visit famous Bondi Beach. Walk the scenic Bondi to Coogee coastal trail, enjoying ocean vistas and rocky cliffs.

itinerary.title: Blue Mountains Day Trip
itinerary.description: Take a day tour to the World Heritage-listed Blue Mountains. Witness the Three Sisters rock formation and ride the Scenic World cableway.

itinerary.title: Royal Botanic Gardens & Departure
itinerary.description: Free morning to stroll the Royal Botanic Gardens and shop in Pitt Street Mall before your flight home.
